title: Evangelion Shoulder Insignias
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Shoulder Insignias             Quote Post by Veefy » Sun Aug 04, 2013 6:28 am [Split from "How aware were Wille of Kaworu?" -- OMF] ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Come to think of it, is there a single Wille logo or emblem on either Eva-02, Eva-08, or on anything Asuka or Mari wear?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Aug 04, 2013 6:53 am Notes that Asuka's Eva has the symbol entirely blue. As for the WILLE symbols, he container with the spare robot-arms for EVA-02 has WILLE logo on it. Now for Kaworu, normally Shinji isn't an Angel, and suddenly he DSS Choker says that an Angel is wearing it, the logical thing would be that Shinji isn't the one wearing it anymore.

[]:             Quote Post by Zoop » Sun Aug 04, 2013 10:55 am ElMariachi wrote: Notes that Asuka's Eva has the symbol entirely blue.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Aug 04, 2013 3:41 pm I veriificated this detail some time ago, and it's an error from the Booklet : the "old" EVA-02 we see during Operation US has the old red and green patch, but the new model with the WILLE armor had the blue patch since the first time we saw it during the NS attack against the WILLE fleet. We don't know why, maybe that's a rank insignia since Asuka seems to be Mari's superior in the field, or maybe it has something to do with her eye(there is other details in her new plugsuit that has blue touches, like the plugsuit's "core" or a pqtch of blue on the left collarbone area), maybe she got the habit to put random pieces of blue in her equipment as a symbol of her ordeal against Bardiel, a way to remember to everyone that she's the only one who has been directly attacked by an Angel and survived, that would be very in character for Asuka. An interesting detail is that in 1.0 before its overhaul seen in 2.0, EVA-00's patch was completely black.

[]:             Quote Post by Zoop » Sun Aug 04, 2013 5:37 pm Ok good that you verified, I checked most of the eva's, but couldn't find a decent one for Eva 02dash, I kinda didn't like to rely on sources other than the movies themself. So rank kind of makes sense for Asuka, but for the other Eva's? Meaning eva00 had the same rank as eva02, which was different (higher/lower?) than eva01? Lest not forget some parts of the eva tend to change color (like the green parts of eva01 turning red during it's awakening). And we know the armor isn't just metal plating (eva01 even regenerated it's arm including it's paintjob againt Sachiel). Before the eva03 activation test, Asuka asks Misato to paint Eva03 red if she ends up liking it. Would a simple paintjob even be possible without swapping it's armor? Maybe I'm going too much into the specifics of the material Eva's are made of, is there is specific thread for that? Anyway, the point I'm trying to make is that the color might be actually functional rather than just decoration.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Aug 04, 2013 10:12 pm Zoop wrote: Before the eva03 activation test, Asuka asks Misato to paint Eva03 red if she ends up liking it. Would a simple paintjob even be possible without swapping it's armor? Maybe I'm going too much into the specifics of the material Eva's are made of, is there is specific thread for that?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Aug 05, 2013 6:04 pm ElMariachi wrote: Notes that Asuka's Eva has the symbol entirely blue. As for the WILLE symbols, he container with the spare robot-arms for EVA-02 has WILLE logo on it.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Aug 05, 2013 7:42 pm Well, the two "spikes" are orange(like pattern orange, Lilins) on the right side of her plugsuit, corresponding to the unscarred side of her face, while the right "spikes" is blue(like pattern blue, Angels) on the left side of her plugsuit, corresponding to the side of her face with the eyepatch and funky eye... As for Mari's "spikes", they blend perfectly with the white shoulders, it's actually Asuka's "spikes" which don't blend all that well, especially the blue one since at lest her breast area has orange in it(the shade of blue of the plugsuit's "core" isn't the same than her "spike's")

[]:             Quote Post by Jimbob » Tue Aug 06, 2013 8:19 am If you're talking about those "badges" on the shoulders they're supposed to have the EVA's number and model type written on it, but they are only written on it in certain shots, and sometimes it even varies as to how its written, and they otherwise usually appear blank (the models however always have them) sort of like how Gundam models have all kinds of additional decals on them that almost never show up in series (In Gundam Seed Destiny, the Strike Rouge is supposed to have a rose like emblem on one shoulder, but its only seen in one or two shots, typically a close up one where its not moving and is otherwise not depicted) It should just be that they aren't shown in those scenes, or they just stopped bothering to properly ID the Eva's since neither organization works for a legitament world government anymore (if one even still exists)

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Aug 04, 2013 6:53 am Notes that Asu
